translations.app.title: BrickBot
translations.tools.title: Tools
translations.tools.profiles.title: Profiles
translations.tools.profiles.description: Create, edit, switch, and delete game-target profiles.
translations.tools.captures.title: Captures
translations.tools.captures.description: Grab a frame from the target window, crop a region, save as a template PNG.
translations.tools.actions.title: Actions
translations.tools.actions.description: Fire any brickbot.action(...) registered by the running script.
translations.actions.title: Registered actions
translations.actions.help: Actions are registered from running scripts via brickbot.action(name, fn). Click "Run" to invoke one.
translations.actions.empty: No actions registered. Start a Run that calls brickbot.action(...).
translations.capture.insertPoint.tip: Insert {x, y} for the hovered pixel
translations.capture.insertColor.tip: Insert vision.colorAt(x, y) for the hovered pixel
translations.capture.insertRoi.tip: Insert {x, y, w, h} for the dragged rectangle (use as a roi: option)
translations.capture.savedAndInserted: Template saved and inserted at cursor
translations.capture.openEditor: Open the Scripts editor to insert.
translations.capture.hoverFirst: Hover over the image first to pick a point.
translations.capture.cropFirst: Drag a rectangle on the image first.
translations.capture.detect.title: Detect
translations.capture.detect.testThis: Test this template against the current capture
translations.capture.detect.bar.needRoi: Drag a rectangle on the image to set the strip ROI.
translations.capture.detect.bar.needTemplate: Pick a template that frames the bar.
translations.capture.crop.title: Crop & insert
translations.capture.empty.title: No frame captured yet
translations.capture.empty.hint: Pick the target window above, then press Capture.
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.settings.theme.tooltip: Light, dark, or follow the OS preference.
translations.settings.logLevel.tooltip: Backend file-log verbosity. Lower levels include all higher levels.
translations.settings.annotationLevel.tooltip: How much in-app help text to show.
translations.settings.theme.label: Theme
translations.settings.language.label: Language
translations.settings.logLevel.label: Log Level
translations.settings.annotationLevel.label: Tooltip Detail
translations.settings.window.resetTooltip: Reset window size and position to defaults
translations.settings.reset.label: Reset All Settings
translations.settings.reset.confirmDescription: This will revert theme, language, and all settings to defaults.
translations.profile.title: Profiles
translations.profile.create.title: New Profile
translations.profile.empty: No profiles yet — create one to get started.
translations.profile.delete.confirmDescription: All scripts, templates, and config for this profile will be removed. This cannot be undone.
translations.profile.duplicate.title: Duplicate Profile
translations.profile.field.name: Name
translations.errors.PAYLOAD_FIELD_NULL: Required field "{{key}}" must not be null.
translations.errors.SCRIPT_NOT_COMPILED: Script {{kind}}/{{name}} has no compiled output. Save it from the editor first.
translations.errors.VISION_FRAME_DECODE_FAILED: Failed to decode the captured frame ({{bytes}} bytes).
translations.errors.CAPTURE_FRAME_TIMEOUT: WinRT capture timed out waiting for a frame from the target window.
